back_translation: Hallelujah! Give praise, O servants of the LORD; praise the name of the LORD.
Blessed be the name of the LORD, both now and forevermore.
From the rising of the sun to its setting, the name of the LORD is to be praised.
The LORD is exalted over all the nations; His glory is above the heavens.
Who is like the LORD our God, the One enthroned on high,
who humbles Himself to behold the heavens and the earth?
He raises the poor from the dust and lifts the needy from the ash heap,
to seat them with nobles, with the nobles of His people.
He settles the barren woman in her home as a joyful mother of children. Hallelujah!
